Our forward collision warning, automatic emergency braking, rear cross traffic warning systems stopped working on our 2023 ID.4 with 2500 miles on it about 2 weeks ago.  Took it to the dealership on 3/3/23 for repairs, after 4 hours the tech came out and was clueless what to what

narrative.headline: What 2023 Volkswagen Id.4 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 438 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (50% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
